LAW AND MOTION 301, AFTER THE ARGUMENT, PLAINTIFF CARITAS MANAGEMENT CORPORATION'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFFS HAVE ESTABLISHED THROUGH ADMISSIBLE EVIDENCE THAT HOUSEHOLD MEMBERS MADE A FALSE REPORT OF INCOME, BASIS FOR BREACH OF THE LEASE. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN CSR # 8189 (301/PJB)

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CARITAS MANAGEMENT CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GUTIERREZ, DOMITILA GONZALEZ, RAYMOND RODRIGUEZ, PABLO RODGRIGUEZ, DOMITILA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2445 MARIPOSA STREET, #223, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94110, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOC
